## Meeting purpose

[Catch-up between Nick (TipTop VC) and Marcel (GrowthX) to discuss potential collaborations and investments.](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel recently left his job to focus on GrowthX, his growth marketing agency](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Nick shared insights on TipTop VC's investment criteria and recent deals](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Discussed potential collaborations between GrowthX and TipTop's portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Explored options for Marcel to become an LP in TipTop Ventures](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's career update

  - [Marcel officially gave notice at his previous job](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Transitioning to focus full-time on GrowthX, his growth marketing agency](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Excited about new customers and continuously improving processes](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)

### TipTop VC's investment approach

  - [Focus on vertical SaaS+ model](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Prioritize experienced/repeat founders and successful operators](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Look for companies aiming to own control points in their vertical](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Passed on recent opportunities due to concerns about TAM and go-to-market strategies](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

### Founder qualities and leadership

  - [Discussed the importance of founders who are "whole human optimized" (mental, physical, emotional therapy)](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Referenced Sequoia's framework of four key founder qualities: human+science, human+intuition, human+technology, and leadership](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Debated the necessity of having all four qualities for building a unicorn](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)

### GrowthX's approach and strategy

  - [Focus on building trust through education and content](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Exploring creative marketing approaches (e.g., Deadpool-style content)](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Emphasis on distribution and leveraging relationships](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Potential collaborations

  - [Nick introduced three portfolio companies interested in GrowthX's services:](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
    1.  Whosmyschool (Q4 initiative)
    2.  Revin (AI platform for trades, 3-4 months from product-market fit)
    3.  GCAI (platform for in-house legal teams, immediate opportunity)
  - [Discussed Project Mark as an ongoing lighter engagement](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)

### LP opportunity for Marcel

  - [Nick proposed options for Marcel to become an LP in TipTop Ventures](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Discussed potential referral fee structure (15-20% for first 6-12 months)](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Explored idea of credit towards LP investment based on client referrals](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nick to send TipTop Ventures deck and investment criteria to Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Nick to provide a referral agreement template](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Marcel to draft and share his referral agreement for review](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Plan to regroup after GrowthX establishes footing with Project Mark](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Explore co-marketing opportunities (e.g., content on marketing for vertical SaaS using AI)](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Nick to make introductions to interested portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/xxECEpBmSPMqTTsp7B9eTFsUKxU9po_L?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
